title: Import Large SQL Files in cPanel via SSH
description: If cPanel phpMyAdmin fails, SSH + MySQL CLI is the most reliable path.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: SSH access lets you bypass upload limits and timeouts entirely.
Related: **How to Import Large SQL Files in cPanel (When phpMyAdmin Fails)**.

content.title: Prep your SQL for SSH import
content.text: Split large dumps into manageable chunks.

faq.question: Do all cPanel hosts allow SSH?
faq.answer: No. Many shared plans disable it.
